◎简　　介  

　　The year is 1592, after an encounter with a sultan who is holding his daughter Sofia Pernas for ransom Captain Drake (Adrian Paul) must find what the sultan has asked for before his nemesis, Don Sandovate (Temuera Morrison), beats him to it.
